Missing WOF-001: UI/UX Display and Interaction Issues: The attendance module has multiple frontend rendering and interaction issues that degrade user experience. Checkout details are not properly sorted chronologically, the attendance edit dialog's map component initialization causes JavaScript errors during rapid mouse interactions, and attendance tables do not automatically refresh after creating leave requests, requiring manual page reload.

Missing WOF-015: Biometric Security Implementation Blocked by SDK Gap: AWS Rekognition currently lacks a Flutter SDK for face liveness detection, creating a technical barrier that prevents implementation of comprehensive biometric security in the attendance module.

Missing WOF-019: Attendance Module Setup & Configuration Incompleteness: The attendance initialization endpoint has transaction handling issues preventing reliable service communication. The module lacks comprehensive attendance tracking functionality for trust domain configurations and has multiple unaddressed capabilities around time tracking and shift management.
